subject: [PATCH 08/13] mm: swap in PMD swap entries as whole THPs during swapoff

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to swap in PMD-level swap entries as whole THPs during swapoff, mirroring the existing behavior at PTE granularity. It introduces a new function `swapin_alloc_pmd_folio` that allocates and charges a PMD-sized swap folio, which is then swapped in using `swapin_folio`. If allocation or charging fails, the PMD swap entry is split into individual PTE-level entries via `__split_huge_pmd`. The patch also updates various functions to handle PMD swap entries correctly during swapoff.
